ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "occurred_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "received_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was received */,
  "suppressed" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the event was suppressed */,
  "access_control_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of access control for the event */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the event (foreign key to categories table) */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the event (foreign key to severity_levels table) */,
  "subcategory" INTEGER /* Subcategory of the event (foreign key to subcategories table) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source IP address and port of the event */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination IP address and port of the event */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Network protocol involved in the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client software */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "threat_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the threats table */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the policy_rules table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_threat_id FOREIGN KEY ("threat_id") REFERENCES threats ("threat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_subcategory FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policy_rules ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent category (null for top-level categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the category table */,
  "parent_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent subcategory (null for top-level subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_levels" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the source */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number of the source */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the events table */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the source IP address */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation data of the source IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the destination */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number of the destination */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the events table */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the destination IP address */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation data of the destination IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destinations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threats" (
  "threat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat */,
  "threat_name" TEXT /* Name of the threat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threat */,
  "threat_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the threat (foreign key to severity_levels table) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threat information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_rules" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy rule (e.g., access control, data handling) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the policy rule is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_users" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the events table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "user_role_in_event" TEXT /* Role the user played in the event (e.g., actor, observer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the events table */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., security, policy) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the events table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "audit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was generated */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, modification) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action performed (e.g., login, modification) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the audit log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base" (
  "kb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge base entry */,
  "kb_name" TEXT /* Name of the knowledge base entry */,
  "kb_description" TEXT /* Description of the knowledge base entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the category table */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the subcategory table */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the knowledge base entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
